---
title: "A. C. Owen"
---

## A. C. Owen

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1873-4)

### Biography

Perhaps the Alice Owen to whom there are payments in the bank account;  Dr. Patricia Moberly may have letters to her?

### Letters

- Letter from March 3d 1876

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
